calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Crunchy Technologies Inc. as follows:
Principal $ 25,833.99
Prejudgment Interest $ 12,510.36
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $440.50 for a total of $41,609.85.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Continued To Aug-21-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/21/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542 (212)
